chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-54 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on exemption application 4. For hearing of main case 15.01.2026 Mr. Pervez Tarique Tagar, advocate for petitioner (s) *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Learned counsel submits that petitioner is real father of detainee, who is presently detained illegally by the unknown persons and she is minor having age of approximately 13 years. He further submits that matter was reported to SHO of P.S Women District Tando Allhyar and though FIR bearing Crime No.01 of 2026 under Section 365-B and 34 PPC was lodged but the Investigation Officer is not taking serious efforts so as to recover the detainee. On being confronted that how this Court interferer into the investigation, counsel submits that he would be satisfied if this petition is disposed of by directing the SSP concerned to monitor the investigation. In view of the above, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed. However, SSP Tando Allahyar is directed to monitor the investigation of aforesaid FIR and submit final report before the learned Magistrate concerned for further orders in accordance with law. Let copy of this Order be communicated to SSP Tando Allahyar for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
